productDisplayName: Nike Women Ballista II White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Ballista II is replete with comfort and style. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe for runs and casual occasions. Product DetailsWhite and orange shoe with mesh upper, perforated synthetic overlays, asymmetrical lacing system and reinforced overlays on the heel cup and above toe guardCushioned sockliner for in-step comfortMeshed and padded tongue and innerNike swoosh on the lateral side of the shoeEVA midsole with padded back sole to lock the foot in placeRubber outsole with rectangular lugs and grooves on the forefoot and backfoot, impact guidance system along the length of the foot, deep flex groove on mid forefoot, arched midfoot and forefoot outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe box for enhanced protection to the forefootWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)  Material and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
